items.name_en: 🆕 Haiyuan External Order【Real Owner】Dynamic Chip M13089 White & Color M12925 Monogram. This All InBB Xph Handbag features Monogram canvas paired with glossy metalware, highlighting a classic style with a signature lock and nameplate. The adjustable shoulder strap continues the brand's trunk-making heritage, while the leather strap adds options for cross-body and shoulder carrying. The foldable design allows for flexible shape adjustment, offering ample space for daily use.

items.name_en: New Horn Bag
items.name_cn:
New Horn Bag
🇩🇪MCM🇩🇪 Original Stock 2024 New Horn Bag AREN VISETOS HOBO Shoulder Bag
This Visetos Hobo bag features a design with a 🐂 adjustable leather shoulder strap and a leather tag with a lock 🔒. It offers a modern reinterpretation of a classic casual style, striking an ideal balance between softness and structure. This small-sized Aren Hobo shoulder bag incorporates design elements from traditional 🇩🇪MCM🇩🇪 luggage, including a removable leather tag and an engraved logo lock, adding a finishing touch.
Material: PVC with cowhide
Color: White
Dimensions: 26x19x9.5cm

items.name_en: New In Stock 🅰️🅰️ CE New Camille 16 Soft
items.name_cn:
New In Stock 🅰️🅰️ CE New Camille 16 Soft
CE Camille new arrival quietly returns to a minimalist elegant style. You can see this from the latest member of the 16 Soft series, the Camille 16 Soft bag. This new design retains the series' signature soft lines and outlines a casual composure with a Hobo silhouette, showing this isn't a bag trying to attract attention, but capturing hearts with low-key charm.
The Camille 16 Soft uses smooth calfskin with a natural sheen. The overall shape is fluid yet structured. The front features the brand's classic 16 metal lock detail. Without excessive decoration, it perfectly showcases taste. Camille 16 Soft comes in Medium and Small sizes. Colors range from steady black and classic tan to warm white and light sand. Every tone echoes the brand's commitment to eternal aesthetics. Just casually holding it gives an effortless chic look.
Can be carried by hand, on the shoulder, or crossbody. Rotating lock closure.
1 main compartment, 1 interior zip pocket.
Includes 1 removable shoulder strap and 1 removable adjustable long strap.
Model: 120693
Color: Brown
Size: 24.5x21.5x5cm
(with original packaging)

items.name_en: New Lady D 🌟 Calfskin Series
items.name_cn:
New Lady D 🌟 Calfskin Series
This Lady D-Joy handbag interprets Dior's profound insight into elegance and beauty. An elegant classic style, meticulously crafted from nude pink calfskin, paired with a light gold-finished metal 'D.I.O.R.' charm to elevate the style, adding a touch of liveliness to the exquisite silhouette. Equipped with a removable chain strap and an adjustable, removable leather shoulder strap, it can be carried by hand, over the shoulder, or crossbody, making it an ideal choice for daily looks.
Size 26cm

items.name_en: New LE 57 Shoulder Bag. This special name comes from Saint Laurent's first boutique on New York's 57th Street, opened by Mr. Saint Laurent in 1968. Made with original lambskin and quilted craftsmanship, the trapezoidal silhouette with large diamond quilting is simple yet stylish, truly retro and fashionable. The bag exudes its unique charm! The leather is incredibly soft and comfortable, making it irresistible to touch! The adjustable shoulder strap fits different heights and weights. Thoughtful practical details!
items.name_cn:
New LE 57 Shoulder Bag. This special name comes from Saint Laurent's first boutique on New York's 57th Street, opened by Mr. Saint Laurent in 1968. Made with original lambskin and quilted craftsmanship, the trapezoidal silhouette with large diamond quilting is simple yet stylish, truly retro and fashionable. The bag exudes its unique charm! The leather is incredibly soft and comfortable, making it irresistible to touch! The adjustable shoulder strap fits different heights and weights. Thoughtful practical details!
Model: 698567
Size: 24x18x5.5cm
